name: Futuristic Slang
en:
Scan me? I'm totally zeroed on this new neural-link. Absolute chrome!
        Don't get fluxed about it. We'll bounce t' th' orbital when th' transit pings.
        That's so burned. Nobody jacks in like that anymore. Get upgraded!
        Mesh me th' deets when ye're quantum. I'll be vector until sunrise.
        Did ye see that glitch? Pure nova! Th' guards nearly vapor-locked!
        Hark ye good fellows and attend t' me words. Pray tell, what business brings thee t' our humble kingdom? 
        By me troth, I have not seen such fine armor in many a fortnight. 
        Verily, th' king shall be most pleased with thy offerings.
        Alas, th' dreaded plague has taken many good souls from our village.
        Forsooth, 'tis a wondrous sight t' behold th' castle at dawn.
        I beseech thee, brave knight, aid us in our time o' need.
        Me liege, th' scouts have returned with dire news from th' borderlands.
        What say ye t' a flagon o' our finest mead? 'Tis brewed with honey from th' royal gardens.
        Th' lady o' th' manor requests thine presence at th' feast this eventide.
        Methinks th' storm approaches. We must seek shelter ere th' heavens open.
        Pray pardon th' intrusion, but urgent matters require thy swift attention.
        Art thou acquainted with th' legend o' th' kraken who guards th' mountain pass?
        Would that I could join thy quest, but me duties bind me t' this place.
        Perchance we shall meet again when fortune smiles upon us both.
        Th' blacksmith works yonder, should thy blade require mending.
        Hearken t' th' wisdom o' th' elders, for they have weathered many winters.
        Mayhap th' old prophecy speaks o' such troubled times as these.
        I shall return anon with provisions for thy journey.
        Fie upon these ruffians who disturb th' king's peace!
        God's wounds! What manner o' creature lurks in th' shadows?
        This sector's gone dark. Too many wirehead runners spiking th' grid.
        Ye looking sparkware? Me databend be th' cleanest in th' underloop.
        That's a solid stream, citizen. Yer rep-score just jumped three notches.
        Don't be such a carbon. Th' AI's got full spect on this quadrant.
        Th' corp-tangle be tightening. Better ghost yer sig before they trace yer mesh.
        I'm running empty on creds. Need t' pull a quick boost before th' system refresh.
        This synthetic be glitched beyond repair. Needs a full core dump and reboot.
        Be ye even reality-checked? That plan be pure static!
        Th' sky-bridges be locked down. We'll need t' take th' flow-tubes and hope we don't get pixeled.
        She's top-tier elite, pure digital royalty. Don't cross her network.
        Who fragmented th' meetcode? Now we're all drifting in different streams.
        This sim be maxxed. Too many users burning bandwidth on vanity mods.
        Th' whole district be about t' cascade. We need t' hit th' buffer zones now.
        That's ancient tech, practically fossil-coded. Still, might be useful if we can interface it.
        Sync yer thoughts or drop from th' cloud. This be precision work.
